title: Expanded Netherite
description:
Enables you to upgrade some items to Netherite
[MC 1.21.X - 1.20.5]
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T117BAZT)
# Expanded Netherite
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba35ffcabef82c89027ba9883d224dbb161a7800.png)

This datapack, "More Netherite Items," is perfect for players who want to safeguard their gear and prevent valuable items from being lost in lava.

## Features
This datapack allows you to upgrade new items to Netherite, giving Minecraft players more options to enhance their gear. Here's the list of items that can now be upgraded to Netherite with the datapack:
- Bow
- Crossbow
- Elytra
- Mace
- Shield
- Shulker Box
- Trident
## New Upgrade Recipe
Each item can be upgraded to its Netherite version using a Netherite ingot and a Netherite Upgrade smithing template in the Smithing Table, adding the fire resistance characteristic of Netherite items to prevent them from burning in lava.

> Note: It is recommended to install the accompanying resource pack made for this datapack to ensure the best visual experience (if you don't find the texture pack you can download it [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/more-netherite-items-rp)

## Compatibility
1.21.X ✅ | 1.20.6 ✅ | 1.20.5 ✅
